inputs.label: Nominal Size
inputs.businessContext: Nominal diameter of the cylindrical parts

inputs.label: Hole Upper Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Upper deviation of the hole from nominal size (positive for larger hole)

inputs.label: Hole Lower Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Lower deviation of the hole from nominal size (negative for smaller hole)

inputs.label: Shaft Upper Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Upper deviation of the shaft from nominal size (positive for larger shaft)

inputs.label: Shaft Lower Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Lower deviation of the shaft from nominal size (negative for smaller shaft)
